project_type: TypeScript monorepo with pnpm workspaces and turborepo - packages are library modules, apps are Next.js frontends, services are backend workers
language: TypeScript (strict mode, ESNext modules, bundler moduleResolution)
build_system: pnpm 10.28.1 + turborepo. Package scripts: build (tsc), typecheck (tsc --noEmit), test (vitest run), lint (eslint .)
test_framework: vitest ^2 with describe/it/expect pattern. Tests live in src/__tests__/ for packages or at package root __tests__/. Direct imports from source (no build needed for tests).
verification_instructions: 1. pnpm install from root 2. pnpm --filter @quant/quant-economy typecheck 3. pnpm --filter @quant/quant-economy test 4. pnpm --filter @quant/quant-economy lint
setup_instructions: pnpm install from monorepo root (handles workspace linking)
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full network access. Node 22 available. pnpm 10.28.1 global. No real payment API keys - use interface adapters.
contribution_requirements: Do NOT edit other apps, shared-ui internals, packages/quant-tools, or CI config. New package goes in packages/quant-economy. UI screens go in apps/quantads only. 40+ tests required.
key_patterns: Packages use: type: module, main/types pointing to src/index.ts, composite tsconfig extending root. Services use class-based pattern with in-memory Maps for storage. Zod schemas for validation. Tests use vitest describe/it/expect/beforeEach. ESLint flat config with typescript-eslint (many rules disabled). Apps use Next.js App Router with @tanstack/react-query, framer-motion, @quant/shared-ui components (Card, Button, LoadingState, ErrorState), @quant/brand theming.
directory_structure: Root: apps/ (Next.js apps), packages/ (shared libraries), services/ (backend workers). Each package has: package.json, tsconfig.json, src/ with index.ts barrel. Tests in src/__tests__/. Apps have src/ (Next.js) and backend/ (Fastify routes/services).
